system.orientation.rotate_hint: Path of Dao plays in landscape. Turn your phone sideways to continue.
combat.pause.title: Paused
combat.death.title: You Lost the Exchange
combat.death.flavor: The dao path is long. Retreat, cultivate, and return when you are ready.
combat.cultivator.label: Cultivator
combat.cultivator.defeated: Cultivator lost the exchange — sits to recover
combat.beast.label: Beast
combat.beast.defeated: Spirit beast fades — qi scatters into the wild
combat.encounter.tier.solo: On this star, rivals meet you one at a time until your cultivation deepens.
combat.encounter.tier.squad: Your qi draws a squad — expect ten cultivators at once.
combat.encounter.tier.horde: You overmatch this star — a hundred Tu Sĩ may answer your strike.
combat.encounter.tier.mass: Return visit power — five hundred weak cultivators; one technique clears the field.
